title: 6FT/180CM Christmas Garland with Eucalyptus Leaves, Pine Foliage and White Berries, Artificial Christmas Garland for Stairs,Fireplace,Table, Window, Festive Wreath, Wedding Party, Xmas Decorations
features: 【Beautiful Christmas Garland】6ft/180cm Real Touch Xmas garland for stairs features eucalyptus foliage and winter white berries, bringing a soft, frosted Christmas look that enhances any festive home décor

【6ft/180cn Christmas Garland for Stairs and Mantels】 Realistic Christmas garland is at 180cm long, this garland is the ideal size for stairs, mantels,table,shelving or window displays,adding a festive accent to Christmas decorations home styling

【Flexible & Durable Garland】 Real touch garland made of high-quality PVC material and iron wire, you can make it to any shape you want, such as W, O, N, or Hearts shapes, and even to a Christmas wreath for front door. The different designs make the beautiful natural garland suitable for many occasions

【Garland for Indoor and Outdoor Use】 With GOVIRAYE Christmas garland hung over your front door, windows, fireplace, bedroom, table or entwined in your stair, banisters, or balcony, which will impress your family, friends, and guests. Warm the Whole Christmas Winter

【Perfect Christmas Gifts】The Christmas garland for fireplace is specially designed to decorate Christmas, A really great gift for your family, friends and your neighbor. Decorate your home with children, filled your home with hope, warmth, and joy. Also Ideal for Christmas parties, Thanksgiving, weddings, and festivals
